description: Output size guidance for DEEP_ONBOARD.md by codebase size. No hard ceilings — include everything that's not redundant.

targets.label: small
targets.guidance: Expect 6-12K tokens. Small codebases have fewer modules but may have dense cross-cutting concerns.

targets.label: medium
targets.guidance: Expect 12-25K tokens. Cover all architecturally significant modules and major request paths.

targets.label: large
targets.guidance: Expect 20-40K tokens. Large codebases have more cross-cutting concerns and deeper trace chains.

targets.label: very_large
targets.guidance: Expect 30-50K tokens. Subsystem decomposition may produce appendices beyond the main document.

note: Sections ordered by stability (high first) to maximize prompt cache prefix hits. No token ceilings — include everything not redundant with file names and signatures.
